programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman with whom Kimble was dining becomes angry when he tells her he must leave town She disappears and is found roughed up but alive Kimble knows she must tell police he did not abduct her in order to save him from being arrested

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike attempts to salvage a survival kit from a German fighter plane shot down during World War II

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Professor Halliday wants more money to carry on his underwater exploration

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: While preparing for a top priority mission Gen Savage replaces a sick crewman with a hotshot gunner only to discover too late that the man has a bad reputation as well as a negative attitude Joe Waller is a washed-out pilot trainee who takes out his resentment on his fellow crew members The resulting friction threatens the integrity of the crew even before Waller is forced to replace the fatally wounded bombardier making him the most important man in the entire mission

programme.title: Night Of Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Night Of Dark Shadows

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan travel to a seaside village to retrieve a cursed foghorn that is being used by a town resident to summon the ghost of a vengeful pirate

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke attempt to build a rowboat

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hymie is introduced to CONTROL as KAOS tries to kidnap a CONTROL scientist

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ enlists an unlikely ally in his effort to bring down Rutherford T Grant after the crooked captain frames a bank robbery on Samantha Stacks and Angie Final episode of the series

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys must scheme to procure new engines for their beloved boat before Binghamton ships the 73 Crew out to a new location

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton angers some of the native islanders then must make amends with them in order to make a good impression on a certain VIP who is due soon for a visit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans but the shows producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren manipulate a Corporate magnate by seemingly restoring his health into selling them a top city newspaper he controls to give the aliens a tool for propaganda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A thirty-year veteran beat cop and longtime friend of Stones is shot during an attempted robbery Stone sets off with a vendetta to get the gunman blurring the line between professional and personal

programme.title: Mission Imposssible
programme.desc: In a rare episode of the series in which the IM Force isnt sent on a government-sanctioned mission theyre forced by a criminal named Egan whos kidnapped the daughter of a friend of Briggs to capture a heavily guarded witness in a trial against him They know Egan plans to kill the witness but Briggs is put in a tight spot and is determined that Egan wont get a chance to kill the witness

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being on the run for 6 months Richard Kimble falls in love with a beautiful woman who has a young son She also has a physically abusive estranged husband that wants Kimble out of town or dead

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As the powerful Barkley family and surrounding Valley community face the prospect of losing their land to a ruthless railroad baron a mysterious stranger arrives with life-changing news for the family

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne falsely accused of murder escapes the law He returns to White Bluff to clear his name by joining a train of settlers headed to California A ministers sister threatens to turn him in to the law until she gets to know him

programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss blackmails King Phineas into luring Jayce with an image of his father to a planet where Saw Boss is ready to destroy him Saw Boss makes good his threat to pull the Vortex Plug which would allow the atmosphere of the upper level

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Duke Windsor is in possession of one of three rings that can point the way to untold riches buried at Sunhenge The second is on display at a Renaissance fair and the third is about to be uncovered at an archaeological dig

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle!! Axe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Decayed Body

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades and the Guardians compete to be the recipients of an ancient aliens vast store of knowledge Show Challenge of The GoBots

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When an archaeologist discovers the remains of the fabled continent of Atlantis Cy-Kill takes advantage of the situation by unleashing a host of ancient demons to destroy the Guardians
